claims.claim: Three Agreement Profile actions compile under the CKB target profile.
Agreement Profile is separate from NovaSeal core.
Receipts are materialized as outputs by implemented actions.
Terminal AgreementCell resource transitions are strict-mode sound.
claims.evidence: primitive-strict 0.16 passes after preserve closed from active plus explicit status/receipt_root/nonce guards

python3 scripts/nova_agreement_tx_shape_harness.py --pretty matched 8/8 shape expectations; cargo run --manifest-path harness/ckb_vm/Cargo.toml --bin novaseal_agreement_ckb_vm_harness -- --pretty matched 11/11 action VM expectations; cargo run --manifest-path harness/ckb_vm/Cargo.toml --bin novaseal_agreement_tx_harness -- --pretty matched 12/12 script-layer and node-verifier expectations

claims.claim: Native CKB funding/settlement shapes are locally verified.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-tx-shape-report.json covers occupied-capacity floors, principal payout, repayment, collateral return, default claim, time reject, party reject, under-capacity reject, and wrong-settlement reject

claims.claim: Compiled Agreement Profile actions execute in CKB VM for positive and negative terminal-path cases.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-ckb-vm-action-report.json covers originate, repay, claim, time reject, party reject, nonce mismatch, receipt-root mismatch, and preserved-field mutation

claims.claim: Resolved Agreement Profile transactions execute through ckb-script and ckb-verification.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-ckb-tx-report.json covers deterministic resolved transactions with action code CellDeps, a local harness lock CellDep, lock/type script groups, non-contextual checks, contextual checks, 12/12 matched expectations, and an exact not-executed fixture partition for known blockers

claims.claim: Native CKB transaction validity and occupied-capacity rejection are verified by resolved transaction execution.
claims.evidence: target/nova-agreement-ckb-tx-report.json verifies accepted originate/repay/claim transactions and rejects under_capacity_reject at the node contextual verifier layer

claims.claim: Payout-cell settlement amounts are enforced on-chain by Agreement Profile scripts.
claims.evidence: wrong_settlement_amount_reject is local-shape-only; current CellScript profile records terminal_amount in receipt data but does not yet bind concrete payout output cells on-chain
